mapper.sql: id, code, area, fee, start_time, end_time, first_weight, first_fee
mapper.insert: insert into t_over_fee_bak(code, area, fee, start_time, end_time, first_weight, first_fee) select code, area, fee, start_time, end_time, first_weight, first_fee from t_over_fee

update.foreach: update t_over_fee set end_time = #{data.startTime} where code = #{data.customerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

mapper.update: update t_fixed_fee set end_time = #{endTime} where code = #{code} and end_time = '2999-12-31'
